auth.welcomeRegisterDesc: Select the profile that best describes your activity to personalize your smart-management experience.
auth.farmerDesc: Manage your crops, optimize resources, and receive smart alerts directly on your farm.
auth.agronomistDesc: Analyze large datasets, manage multiple clients, and generate high-value agronomic reports.
auth.aboutYouDesc: Complete your contact information to personalize your SATECHO experience.
auth.protectAccountDesc: Set your password to complete your SATECHO registration.
auth.acceptMarketing: I agree to receive commercial communications, updates, and recommendations.
auth.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and accept the
auth.verifyDesc: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Check your inbox and spam folder to activate your account.
auth.expires24h: The link will expire in 24 hours.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: Sorry, the verification link is no longer valid or has expired for security reasons. You can request a new one now.
auth.secureGrowth: Secure growth: protecting your agricultural data integrity is our priority.

validation.fullNameInvalidChars: Name must not contain numbers or symbols

messages.requestFailed: We could not complete the request.
messages.serviceUnavailable: We could not reach the service. Please try again.
messages.onboardingServiceUnavailable: We could not reach the onboarding service.
messages.accountNotFound: No account is registered with this email. Create an account before signing in.
messages.passwordMismatch: The password does not match this account.
messages.accountAlreadyExists: An account is already registered with this email. Sign in or use another email.
messages.accountCreatedLocal: Account created locally. Verify your email to continue.
messages.verificationLinkSimulated: Verification link simulated. Use the API environment to test login, registration, and confirmation.
messages.verificationPendingNotFound: We could not find a pending verification account for this email.
messages.authApiRegisterSuccess: Account created. Check your email to verify it.
messages.savedLocal: Saved locally. You can continue later.
